sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - BERTA di Susa (-after 22 Apr 1065).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - BERTA di Susa, daughter of MANFREDO UDALRICO [II] Marchese di Torino e Susa & his wife Berta d'Este (-after 22 Apr 1065).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Berta di Turino於大約1022年出生在義大利阿布盧左迪瓦斯托時，她的父親Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa45歲，母親Berta di Milano48歲。她和Marquis Tetone Oddone de Saluzzo di Savona II至少有1個兒子。她去世於大約1064年在義大利阿布盧左迪易斯東尼奧享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berta di Turino于大约1022年出生在意大利阿布盧左迪瓦斯托时，她的父亲Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa45岁，母亲Berta di Milano48岁。她和Marquis Tetone Oddone de Saluzzo di Savona II至少有1个儿子。她去世于大约1064年在意大利阿布盧左迪易斯東尼奧享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Turino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Antonio, Salvatore, Domenic, Francesco, Marco, Pasquale.
Italian: from a pet form of the personal name   Furio  .

variants.name: Furio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Romeo, Vito, Angelo, Carmine, Domenic, Giovanni, Girolamo, Oronzo, Rocco, Vincenza.
Italian (southern): from the personal name Furio (from Latin Furius, probably of Etruscan origin), which was particularly popular during the Renaissance.

nameMeanings.name: Berta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Berta di Turino was born about 1022, in Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italy, her father, Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa, was 45 and her mother, Berta di Milano, was 48. She had at least 1 son with Marquis Tetone Oddone de Saluzzo di Savona II. She died about 1064, in Istonio, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italy, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berta di Turino est née environ 1022, à Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italie, son père, Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Berta di Milano, avait 48 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Marquis Tetone Oddone de Saluzzo di Savona II. Elle est décédée environ 1064, à Istonio, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italie, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berta di Turino um 1022 in Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa 45 und ihre Mutter Berta di Milano 48. Sie hatte mit Marquis Tetone Oddone de Saluzzo di Savona II mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1064 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Istonio, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berta di Turino è nata il circa 1022 nel Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italia, sua padre, Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Berta di Milano, aveva 48 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Marquis Tetone Oddone de Saluzzo di Savona II. Morì circa 1064, nel Istonio, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italia, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Berta di Turinoが約1022年にイタリアアブルズゾチエティヴァストーで生まれた時，父Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susaは45歳，母Berta di Milanoは48歳であった。彼女はMarquis Tetone Oddone de Saluzzo di Savona IIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1064年にイタリアアブルズゾチエティイストニオで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Berta di Turino(이)가 대략 1022년 이탈리아 아브루즈오 치티 바스토에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Berta di Milano(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 Marquis Tetone Oddone de Saluzzo di Savona II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1064년 이탈리아 아브루즈오 치티 이스토니오에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.um 1022–um 1064: tany ho any amin'ny 1022–tany ho any amin'ny 1064

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berta di Turino nasceu aproximadamente 1022, em Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Itália, seu pai, Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Berta di Milano, tinha 48 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Marquis Tetone Oddone de Saluzzo di Savona II. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1064, em Istonio, Chieti, Abruzzo, Itália, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berta di Turino родилась около 1022 г. в местности васто, чиети, абруззо, Италия, её отцу по имени Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Berta di Milano, 48. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Marquis Tetone Oddone de Saluzzo di Savona II. Она умерла около 1064 г. в местности истонио, чиети, абруззо, Италия в возрасте 44 лет.

sm.um 1022–um 1064: e tusa o le 1022–e tusa o le 1064

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berta di Turino nació aproximadamente 1022, en Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italia, su papá, Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Berta di Milano, tenía 48 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Marquis Tetone Oddone de Saluzzo di Savona II. Murió aproximadamente 1064, en Istonio, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italia, a la edad de 44 años.
